initial_message: There was a major storm overnight and I have a real mess. I'm calling from my driveway. Something — possibly a tree, possibly part of my neighbor's shed that blew apart — came through my property and there is damage. I can see damage to my parked car, to my garage roof, and what looks like a section of fence between us that's just gone. Emergency services are still here. I have not been able to walk the property. POL-1008.

clarification_responses.tree: I genuinely cannot tell from here whether what hit my car was a tree or debris from my neighbor's shed. There's too much wreckage piled on top.
clarification_responses.what hit: I cannot tell yet. There is a mix of tree limbs and what looks like sheet metal from the neighbor's shed across everything.
clarification_responses.car: The windshield is smashed and the hood is dented but I cannot tell what hit it or how badly the engine is affected. Emergency services have not let me approach it.
clarification_responses.garage: The roof is partially collapsed on one side. I have no idea whether water has gotten in or whether the structure is sound.
clarification_responses.neighbor: We have not been able to speak — they are also dealing with their own damage. I do not know if their shed coming apart is what caused the damage to my property or if it was an independent tree.
clarification_responses.fence: A roughly twenty-foot section of the shared fence is gone. I cannot tell from which side the force came.
clarification_responses.estimate: I really cannot give you any estimate right now. I am standing in my driveway and emergency services have the area taped off.
clarification_responses.police: Fire department is here, no police report yet.
